description: Task dispatch prompt for Codex executive session. Assembles task metadata (id, path, intent, scope, risk, model posture) and description into a structured spec that the Codex session receives via tmux send-keys. Golden contract v2 evaluates behavioral comprehension and truthful closure under the deliberately read-only probe; dispatch metadata is input context, never required response vocabulary. The retired v1 contract and failed release receipt are preserved under archive/v1.
